text:
Mike appears under <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/articles/contributors/#staff-committers> and under <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/articles/contributors/#contrib-additional> …

… but not yet in memoriam, <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/articles/contributors/#contrib-develinmemoriam>. 

See also: bug 273530 comment 6 for Hans.
